headline: Philip Morris International Inc (PM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Smoke-Free Growth ...
summary: Philip Morris International Inc (PM) reports robust growth in its smoke-free segment, driving a 16% increase in adjusted diluted EPS amidst challenging market conditions.

headline: Is It Time To Consider Philip Morris International (PM) After Its Recent Product Shift?
summary: Wondering if Philip Morris International at around US$163.95 is priced for opportunity or already reflects the story you are buying into? This article walks you through how the current share price stacks up against a range of valuation checks. The stock has returned 4.3% over the last 7 days, 0.4% over the past month, 2.3% year to date, 1.0% over 1 year, 90.8% over 3 years and 120.8% over 5 years, which gives useful context before weighing up today’s valuation.
